description_long: This awning features a rectangular canopy with alternating blue and white vertical stripes, creating a classic and inviting appearance. The canopy is supported by a simple, fixed frame structure that extends downward at both ends, suggesting attachment points for mounting above a window or storefront. The fabric appears taut and evenly stretched across the frame, with clean, straight edges and no visible decorative trim or valance. The surface of the canopy is smooth and likely made from weather-resistant synthetic fabric, suitable for outdoor urban environments. The underside of the awning is plain, with the support structure minimally visible from the side views. There is no visible branding, signage, or additional ornamentation on the canopy.
description: A rectangular blue-and-white striped awning with a smooth, taut canopy and a simple fixed frame, designed for mounting above windows or storefronts.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the blue and white striped canopy with straight edges and no visible trim.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile of the awning and the downward-extending support frame at each end.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the striped pattern and straight edge of the canopy.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the support structure extending downward.
attribute_mounting_location: wall-mounted above a window or storefront facade
attribute_canopy_pattern: alternating vertical blue and white stripes
attribute_edge_trim_style: straight edge with no decorative trim
attribute_support_structure_type: fixed frame with downward-extending side supports
